summary: Tested 5 specific UI/logic fixes for iteration 36: (1) Consensus strings use dynamic model count, (2) Position resolver uses GENERIC_TO_SPECIFIC constraints, (3) Position-role validation rejects mismatches, (4) Scan-prop includes position/role fields, (5) Frontend uses GE/GK/GP model labels and @ vs 'vs' matchup display. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend loads correctly with Soccer/Basketball selector, scan functionality, and proper branding.
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 fixes verified in code: consensus strings use len(valid_preds) for dynamic count, GENERIC_TO_SPECIFIC constrains Defender to CB/LB/RB/LWB/RWB, POSITION_ROLE_MAP validates role-position compatibility (CB cannot have Fullback role), scan.py looks up player_positions collection for position/role, ProjectionCard.jsx uses GE/GK/GP labels and @ for away games
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 verified 5 specific fixes: (1) predict.py and basketball_predict.py consensus strings now use len(valid_preds) instead of hardcoded /4, (2) GENERIC_TO_SPECIFIC mapping constrains position resolver to only allow positions within API-Sports category (e.g., Defender -> CB/LB/RB/LWB/RWB), (3) POSITION_ROLE_MAP validates role-position compatibility (prevents Ball-Playing CB for LB), (4) scan.py looks up player_positions MongoDB collection and includes position/role in extracted object, (5) ProjectionCard.jsx uses GE/GK/GP model nicknames and @ for away games. All tests pass.

features_verified.consensus_strings_dynamic_count: PASS - predict.py and basketball_predict.py use len(valid_preds) for model count
features_verified.position_resolver_category_constraints: PASS - GENERIC_TO_SPECIFIC mapping constrains positions by API-Sports category
features_verified.scan_prop_position_fields: PASS - scan.py includes position/role lookup from player_positions collection
features_verified.frontend_model_labels: PASS - ProjectionCard.jsx uses GE/GK/GP instead of AI-1/AI-2/AI-3
features_verified.frontend_matchup_display: PASS - Uses @ for away games and vs for home games
features_verified.frontend_scan_position_badge: PASS - App.js displays position badge when ext.position is available
